name: Peanut Butterscotch Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the oleo or butter and brown sugar together until smooth.
2. Stir in the sifted flour until a crumbly mixture is formed.
3. Press the mixture into an ungreased 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking pan, using your hands if necessary.
4. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
5. In a saucepan, combine sugar and corn syrup; heat to boiling over medium heat.
6. Remove from heat and add butterscotch pieces and peanut butter. Stir until the chips are melted.
7. Stir in the corn flakes.
8. Spread the mixture evenly over the baked layer.
9. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
